items.title: Pfizer protects $6.4bn heart disease blockbuster from generics, for now
items.summary: Pfizer’s Vyndamax will be free from generics competition until 2031 in a boost to the company’s revenue streams.

items.title: Eli Lilly bets on recombinases in $2.25bn Profluent R&D pact
items.summary: Eli Lilly and Profluent will harness AI to discover and develop recombinases for precise, large-scale gene editing.

items.title: The strategic investments expanding CDMO capabilities for HPAPIs and ADCs
items.summary: Demand for HPAPIs and ADCs is accelerating, prompting CDMOs to invest to strengthen manufacturing capabilities for oncology.

items.title: Novartis’ Q1 sales miss hints at industry’s utilisation of M&A remedies
items.summary: Novartis’ Q1 was hit by generics erosion, though its Avidity-bolstered pipeline is set for a robust future.

items.title: Arcera and Fosun sign MoU for neuroscience innovation
items.summary: Arcera Life Sciences and Fosun Pharma have signed an MoU for a strategic long-term collaboration in the global life sciences industry.
